Bob Dylan, 8/20/03, New York, New York, Hammerstein Ballroom, 2CDR

Unknown rec. Great sound


CD1

1 Maggie's Farm (Bob on piano, Tommy Morrongiello on electric guitar), 2 Senor (Tales Of Yankee Power), (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy Morrongiello on electric guitar), 3 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano, Tommy Morrongiello on electric guitar), 4 Watching The River Flow, (Bob on piano and harp, Chuck Loeb on Alembic electric guitar), 5 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano, Chuck Loeb on Alembic electric guitar), 6 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 7 This Wheel's On Fire (Bob on piano and harp, Chuck Loeb on Alembic electric guitar), 8 You Ain't Goin' Nowhere (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 9 Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues (Bob on piano and harp, Andy York on Telecaster), 10 Cold Irons Bound (Bob on piano), 11 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll (acoustic) (Bob on piano), 12 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Tommy Morrongiello on electric guitar, Larry on slide guitar),

CD2

1 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic, (Bob on piano and harp, Chuck Loeb on Alembic electric guitar), 2 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tommy Morrongiello on electric guitar, Tony on standup bass), 3 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 4 All Along The Watchtower, (Bob on piano, Tommy Morrongiello on electric guitar, Chuck Loeb on Alembic electric guitar), 5 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 (Bob on piano, Andy York on Telecaster)
